title: Prophetic Supplications for Umrah
description: A selected collection of supplications and remembrance established from the Prophet ﷺ for each stage of the journey.

items.title: The Prophet's ﷺ Talbiyah
items.arabic: لبّيك اللهم لبّيك، لبّيك لا شريك لك لبّيك، إنّ الحمد والنعمة لك والملك، لا شريك لك.
items.translation: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Verily all praise, grace, and sovereignty belong to You. You have no partner.

items.title: Beginning of Each Round
items.arabic: بسم الله، والله أكبر، اللهم إيماناً بك، وتصديقاً بكتابك، ووفاءً بعهدك، واتّباعاً لسنّة نبيك محمد ﷺ.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, and Allah is Greatest. O Allah, out of faith in You, belief in Your Book, fulfillment of Your covenant, and in emulation of the Sunnah of Your Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.

items.title: Between the Yamani Corner and the Black Stone
items.arabic: ﴿ رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ ﴾
items.translation: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

items.title: Upon Ascending Safa and Marwah
items.arabic: ﴿ إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِن شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ ﴾ أبدأ بما بدأ الله به.
items.translation: Indeed, Safa and Marwah are among the symbols of Allah. I begin with that which Allah began with.

items.title: On Safa and Marwah
items.arabic: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له، له الملك وله الحمد، وهو على كل شيء قدير، لا إله إلا الله وحده، أنجز وعده، ونصر عبده، وهزم الأحزاب وحده.
items.translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone, without partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and to Him belongs praise, and He is over all things competent. There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone; He fulfilled His promise, aided His servant, and defeated the factions alone.

items.title: Entering the Mosque
items.translation: O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy.

items.title: Seeing the Kaaba
items.arabic: اللهم زد هذا البيت تشريفاً وتعظيماً وتكريماً ومهابة، وزد من شرّفه وكرّمه ممن حجّه أو اعتمره تشريفاً وتكريماً وتعظيماً وبرّاً.
items.translation: O Allah, increase this House in honor, greatness, nobility, and awe, and increase those who honor and noble it among those who perform Hajj or Umrah in honor, nobility, greatness, and righteousness.

items.title: When Drinking Zamzam Water
items.arabic: اللهم إني أسألك علماً نافعاً، ورزقاً واسعاً، وشفاءً من كل داء.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, abundant provision, and healing from every illness.
